name: agent-rate-limiter-mcp
title: Agent Rate Limiter Mcp
description: Fleet-wide shared rate limiter for A2A + multi-MCP deployments. Most MCP servers rate-limit independently — a hostile agent hitting 10 MCPs gets 10x quota. This MCP is the shared counter: every MCP checks here before allowing a call. Sliding window + concurrency grants + signed enforcement attestations. By MEOK AI Labs.
